title: bus.tengine.main.advanced.v1
description: Emitted by auto_refresh_worktrees.sh when the main branch advances. Produced by tengine-nervous-bus-client emit_main_advanced().

sha.description: Git SHA of the new main branch HEAD

refreshed.description: List of worktree agent IDs that were refreshed

conflicted.description: List of worktree agent IDs that had merge conflicts

clean_count.description: Number of worktrees that were already clean (no action needed)
